description: AI-based Air Quality Forecaster for Urban Pollution Monitoring - Predicts hyper-local AQI 24-48 hours ahead using ARIMA, LSTM, and ST-GNN models with Streamlit demo

userStories.title: Create project repository structure
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the full repository folder structure set up so I can organize code properly.
acceptanceCriteria: Create directories: src/data, src/models, src/evaluate, src/viz, src/utils
Create directories: data/raw, data/processed, data/simulated, data/splits, data/graph
Create directories: models, configs, tests, app, app/components, notebooks, outputs
Create empty __init__.py in all src/ subdirectories

userStories.title: Create requirements.txt with pinned dependencies
userStories.description: As a developer, I need all dependencies pinned for reproducibility.

userStories.title: Implement seed utility for reproducibility
userStories.description: As a developer, I need deterministic random seeds across all libraries.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/utils/seed.py with set_seed(seed: int) function
Function sets torch.cuda.manual_seed_all if CUDA available

userStories.title: Implement config loader utility
userStories.description: As a developer, I need YAML config loading with defaults.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/utils/config.py with load_config(path: str) function
Returns dict from YAML file if exists
Returns hardcoded defaults if file not found

userStories.title: Implement JSON structured logger
userStories.description: As a developer, I need structured logging in JSON format.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/utils/logger.py with get_logger(name: str) function
Logger outputs JSON with timestamp, level, module, message fields
Log files written to outputs/logs/ with rotation at 50MB

userStories.title: Implement error guard utilities
userStories.description: As a developer, I need input validation and error handling helpers.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement validate_aqi_range(values) that clips to [0, 500] with warning
Implement handle_oom decorator for GPU memory errors

userStories.title: Create YAML config files for models
userStories.description: As a developer, I need config files for LSTM and ST-GNN hyperparameters.
acceptanceCriteria: Create configs/lstm.yaml with seq_len=72, horizon=24, batch_size=64, lr=1e-3
Create configs/stgnn.yaml with batch_size=32, lr=5e-4, epochs=100
Create configs/data.yaml with paths and normalization settings

userStories.title: Implement Kaggle data fetch function
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to download AQI data from Kaggle.
acceptanceCriteria: Function downloads 'Air Quality Data in India' dataset
Function filters for Pune rows only
Function returns DataFrame with timestamp, pollutants, aqi columns
Handles download errors with retry logic

userStories.title: Implement Open-Meteo weather fetch function
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to fetch weather data from Open-Meteo API.
acceptanceCriteria: Add fetch_weather(lat, lon, start_date, end_date) to src/data/fetch.py
Function fetches temperature, humidity, wind_speed, wind_direction, rainfall
Function returns DataFrame with hourly data
Implements retry with exponential backoff on failure

userStories.title: Implement OpenAQ data fetch function
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to fetch pollution data from OpenAQ API.
acceptanceCriteria: Function fetches PM2.5, PM10, NO2, SO2, CO, O3 measurements
Function handles pagination for large date ranges
Returns DataFrame with timestamp and pollutant columns

userStories.title: Implement data cleaning functions
userStories.description: As a developer, I need functions to clean raw AQI data.
acceptanceCriteria: Flag and drop gaps > 12 hours with log entry

userStories.title: Implement outlier detection and clipping
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to detect and clip outliers.
acceptanceCriteria: Add clip_outliers(df, column, percentile=99.9) to preprocess.py
Values beyond percentile replaced with percentile value
All replacements logged with original value and node_id

userStories.title: Implement CPCB AQI computation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to compute AQI from sub-indices using CPCB formula.
acceptanceCriteria: Add compute_aqi(pm25, pm10, no2, so2, co, o3) to preprocess.py
Implements CPCB breakpoint table linear interpolation for each pollutant
Returns max of all sub-indices as final AQI

userStories.title: Implement lag feature engineering
userStories.description: As a developer, I need lag features for time series prediction.
acceptanceCriteria: Add create_lag_features(df, column, lags=[1,6,24]) to preprocess.py
Creates columns like AQI_lag_1h, AQI_lag_6h, AQI_lag_24h
Ensures no data leakage (only past values used)

userStories.title: Implement rolling feature engineering
userStories.description: As a developer, I need rolling statistics features.
acceptanceCriteria: Add create_rolling_features(df, column, windows=[24,72]) to preprocess.py
Creates rolling mean and std columns

userStories.title: Implement wind vector computation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need wind vectors from speed and direction.

userStories.title: Implement calendar feature encoding
userStories.description: As a developer, I need calendar features for temporal patterns.
acceptanceCriteria: Creates hour sine/cosine encoding for rush-hour cyclicity
Creates is_holiday and is_diwali_week binary flags

userStories.title: Implement normalization with MinMaxScaler
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to normalize features to [0,1] range.
acceptanceCriteria: Fits MinMaxScaler on training data only

userStories.title: Implement train/val/test chronological split
userStories.description: As a developer, I need proper time series splits.
acceptanceCriteria: Add create_splits(df, train_ratio=0.7, val_ratio=0.15) to preprocess.py
Saves indices to data/splits/splits.json with seed

userStories.title: Implement Parquet save/load for processed data
userStories.description: As a developer, I need fast Parquet I/O for processed data.

userStories.title: Define Pune node grid coordinates
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the 10 Pune neighborhood coordinates.
acceptanceCriteria: Each node has id, name, lat, lon, characteristic
Nodes: Shivajinagar, Hinjewadi, Pimpri-Chinchwad, Hadapsar, Katraj, Deccan, Viman Nagar, Kothrud, Talegaon, Mundhwa

userStories.title: Implement IoT sensor simulator base
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to simulate synthetic sensor data.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/data/iot_sim.py with generate_base_signal(start_date, end_date) function
Uses actual Kaggle data for Shivajinagar as city-wide base

userStories.title: Implement node-specific IoT variations
userStories.description: As a developer, I need node-specific AQI biases.
acceptanceCriteria: Adds Gaussian noise with std=5 AQI units

userStories.title: Implement temporal pattern injection
userStories.description: As a developer, I need rush-hour, Diwali, and monsoon effects.

userStories.title: Generate all 10 node IoT CSVs
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to generate synthetic CSVs for all nodes.
acceptanceCriteria: Generates one CSV per node at data/simulated/node_{id}_simulated.csv
Columns: timestamp, node_id, pm25, pm10, no2, aqi_simulated
All AQI values in [0, 500], no NaN

userStories.title: Create test_fetch.py unit tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need tests for data fetch functions.
acceptanceCriteria: Test fetch functions with mocked API responses
Assert returned DataFrame has required columns
Assert no NaN in required columns

userStories.title: Create test_preprocess.py unit tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need tests for preprocessing functions.
acceptanceCriteria: Test AQI computation returns values in [0, 500]
Test lag features have no NaN in valid range

userStories.title: Create test_iot_sim.py unit tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need tests for IoT simulation.
acceptanceCriteria: Test 10 CSVs created with identical timestamps

userStories.title: Implement PyTorch Dataset for LSTM
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a Dataset class for sliding windows.
acceptanceCriteria: __getitem__ returns (X, y) where X.shape = (seq_len, n_features), y.shape = (horizon,)

userStories.title: Create test_dataset.py unit tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need tests for PyTorch Dataset.

userStories.title: Implement ARIMA model wrapper
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an ARIMA wrapper with auto-order selection.
acceptanceCriteria: Uses pmdarima auto_arima with seasonal=True, m=24
Falls back to ARIMA(2,1,2) on convergence failure

userStories.title: Implement ARIMA training script
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to train ARIMA models for all nodes.
acceptanceCriteria: Trains one model per node (10 models)

userStories.title: Implement LSTM architecture
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the stacked LSTM model definition.

userStories.title: Implement LSTM training loop
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the LSTM training script.
acceptanceCriteria: Uses HuberLoss, Adam optimizer with ReduceLROnPlateau
Uses mixed precision (AMP) for memory efficiency
Checkpoints best model by validation MAE

userStories.title: Create test_lstm.py unit tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need tests for LSTM model.
acceptanceCriteria: Test forward pass produces correct output shape

userStories.title: Build graph adjacency matrix
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the graph structure for ST-GNN.
acceptanceCriteria: Add build_graph() function to a new src/models/graph_utils.py
Computes distance-based adjacency matrix for 10 nodes
Edge weight = inverse distance, normalized per row
Saves adjacency_matrix.npy and edge_index.pt to data/graph/

userStories.title: Implement ST-GNN architecture
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the A3TGCN model definition.
acceptanceCriteria: Falls back to GRU+GCNConv if A3TGCN unavailable

userStories.title: Implement ST-GNN training loop
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the ST-GNN training script.
acceptanceCriteria: Saves best checkpoint by validation MAE

userStories.title: Create test_stgnn.py unit tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need tests for ST-GNN model.
acceptanceCriteria: Test forward pass with graph input
Test output shape is (batch, n_nodes, horizon)

userStories.title: Implement evaluation metrics module
userStories.description: As a developer, I need MAE, RMSE, MAPE metrics.

userStories.title: Implement model comparison module
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to compare all three models.
acceptanceCriteria: Computes all metrics for ARIMA, LSTM, ST-GNN

userStories.title: Create test_metrics.py unit tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need tests for metric computations.
acceptanceCriteria: Test MAE, RMSE on hand-computed examples
Test no division by zero in MAPE

userStories.title: Implement Folium heatmap builder
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create AQI heatmaps.
acceptanceCriteria: Uses Folium with CartoDB Positron basemap
AQI color scale: green (0-50) to maroon (401-500)
Adds CircleMarker per node with tooltip

userStories.title: Add heatmap legend component
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a legend showing AQI categories.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows: Good, Satisfactory, Moderate, Poor, Very Poor, Severe

userStories.title: Implement forecast plot generator
userStories.description: As a developer, I need actual vs predicted time series plots.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/viz/plots.py with create_forecast_plot(actual, predictions, node_id) function
Plots actual AQI and all 3 model predictions
Shades AQI category bands in background

userStories.title: Implement training loss curve plots
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to visualize training progress.
acceptanceCriteria: Add create_loss_plot(train_losses, val_losses, model_name) to plots.py
Plots train and validation loss per epoch

userStories.title: Create test_heatmap.py unit tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need tests for heatmap generation.

userStories.title: Create Streamlit app structure
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the basic Streamlit app layout.

userStories.title: Implement Streamlit Page 1: Overview
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see project overview on the landing page.
acceptanceCriteria: Key stats: 10 neighborhoods, 24-48h horizon, best MAE
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Implement Streamlit Page 2: Live Forecaster
userStories.description: As a user, I want to get AQI predictions for a location and date.
acceptanceCriteria: Date picker for forecast date (max 2 days ahead)
Shows: predicted AQI, category badge, health advisory
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Implement Streamlit Page 3: Heatmap
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see pollution levels across all neighborhoods.
acceptanceCriteria: Table below shows all 10 nodes with predicted AQI
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Implement Streamlit Page 4: Model Comparison
userStories.description: As a user, I want to compare ARIMA, LSTM, and ST-GNN performance.
acceptanceCriteria: Interactive Plotly bar chart showing MAE comparison
Actual vs predicted line chart for selected node
Key insight callout showing improvement percentages
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Implement Streamlit Page 5: Technical Details
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see architecture and training details.
acceptanceCriteria: Training loss curves for LSTM and ST-GNN
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add model caching to Streamlit
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to cache loaded models.
acceptanceCriteria: Models loaded only once per session
Shows last updated timestamp of model checkpoint

userStories.title: Add error handling to Streamlit
userStories.description: As a user, I should see friendly errors, not tracebacks.
acceptanceCriteria: If model not found, show 'Model not trained yet' message
No raw tracebacks shown to user
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create README with setup instructions
userStories.description: As a developer, I need clear setup documentation.

userStories.title: Add type hints to all public functions
userStories.description: As a developer, I need type annotations for maintainability.
acceptanceCriteria: All functions in src/ have type hints

userStories.title: Add docstrings to all public functions
userStories.description: As a developer, I need documentation on all functions.
acceptanceCriteria: All functions in src/ have docstrings
